ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "author_l_f" TEXT /* Author name in last name, first name format */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* The author's official website */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* The birth year of the author */,
  "death_year" INTEGER /* The death year of the author (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* The nationality of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, book club leader, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile description */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "reading_goal" INTEGER /* The user's annual reading goal (number of books) */,
  "completed_books" INTEGER /* The number of books the user has completed */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* The number of followers the user has */,
  "following" INTEGER /* The number of users the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_clubs" (
  "book_club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book club */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the book club */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book club */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user leading the book club */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the book club was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the book club was last updated */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the book club meets */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the book club */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website or social media link for the book club */,
  "member_count" INTEGER /* Number of members in the book club */,
  "private" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the book club is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_clubs_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_club_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book club member relationship */,
  "book_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book club */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date the user joined the book club */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the member in the book club (e.g., leader, moderator, member) */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* The last date the member was active in the book club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_club_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_club_members_book_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_club_id") REFERENCES book_clubs ("book_club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_club_meeting_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant in a book club meeting */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book club meeting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Whether the user attended the meeting */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the user about the meeting */,
  "attendance_time" TEXT /* The time the participant attended the meeting */,
  "participation_score" INTEGER /* A score to indicate the level of participation in the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_club_meeting_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_club_books" (
  "book_club_book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book in a book club */,
  "book_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book club */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the book to the club */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Date the book was added to the club */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the book (e.g., planned, in-progress, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the book club started reading the book */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the book club finished reading the book */,
  "discussion_topics" TEXT /* Key discussion topics for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_club_book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_club_books_added_by FOREIGN KEY ("added_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_club_books_book_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_club_id") REFERENCES book_clubs ("book_club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "spoiler" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the review contains spoilers */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* The number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* The number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* The number of comments on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., add_book, write_review, attend_meeting) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_score" INTEGER /* A score to indicate the importance of the activity */,
  "activity_link" TEXT /* A link to the activity (e.g., a blog post, a discussion thread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_shelves" (
  "shelf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookshelf */,
  "shelf_name" TEXT /* Name of the bookshelf */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bookshelf */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* The priority of the bookshelf */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* A color code to visually represent the bookshelf */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_book_shelves" (
  "user_book_shelf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-book-shelf relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "shelf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookshelf */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Date the book was added to the shelf */,
  "order" INTEGER /* The order of the book in the shelf */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* The visibility of the book in the shelf (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_book_shelf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_book_shelves_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_book_shelves_shelf_id FOREIGN KEY ("shelf_id") REFERENCES book_shelves ("shelf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_club_discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion or comment */,
  "book_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book club */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book being discussed */,
  "discussion_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* The number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* The number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "replies" INTEGER /* The number of replies to the comment */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* A flag to indicate if the comment is pinned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_club_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_club_discussions_book_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_club_id") REFERENCES book_clubs ("book_club_id")
)
